Short CV

Semiha Füsun AKDAĞ AYCİBİN graduated from Hacettepe University, Department of Psychology in 1975. In 1979, she completed her master's degree in Psychological Counseling and Guidance at Boğaziçi University and in 1985, she completed her doctorate in Education at The Ohio State University and received her Ph. She is currently working as an Assistant Professor at the Department of Psychology (English), Faculty of Humanities and Social Sciences.
